recentArticles.title: How Jay-Z Changed Rap With ‘Reasonable Doubt’ - Defector
recentArticles.snippet: # How Jay-Z Changed Rap With ‘Reasonable Doubt’. If you went back in time to New York in the early '90s, not a soul would believe you if you told them Jay-Z would end up where he is today. Jay-Z's relatively delayed breakthrough made him something of a late bloomer, even in an era when stars weren't minted as quickly and early as they are now. It took him a while to figure out how to be himself on wax. It was his big homie Jaz-O who put him on, and the two of them had a Das EFX, Fu-Schnickens fast-rapping style that was as technically impressive as it was uninteresting. Instead it's the Jay we're a lot more familiar with: not just the hustler, but the boss. Aside from the rapping itself, a big part of why *Reasonable Doubt* resonates so much still is that it was what we would call today an exercise in personal branding.

recentArticles.title: 2010s pop star returns to Bay Area on first tour in 6 years - San Francisco Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: # 2010s pop star returns to Bay Area on first tour in 6 years. A decade after “Location” launched him to stardom, Khalid is looking back on the song that changed his life. The Grammy-nominated Texas singer, whose full name is Khalid Donnel Robinson, broke through in the late 2010s with a string of introspective pop hits. Last summer, the singer gave local fans a first listen to his fourth studio album, “After the Sun Goes Down,” during an afternoon performance at San Francisco’s Golden Gate Park one day after its release. On Friday, June 26, Khalid returns to the Bay Area, this time across the Bay Bridge for a concert at the Greek Theatre in Berkeley as part of his It’s Always Summer Somewhere Tour — his first in six years. After going TikTok viral, this rising pop star is coming to S.F. One of Oakland’s largest festivals returns with Grammy-winning headliner. She joined the Chronicle as a summer 2023 intern for the Datebook team.

recentArticles.title: Uber Avoids California Ballot War as Governor Signs Lawyers Deal - Bloomberg Law News
recentArticles.snippet: Email&body=Here%20is%20a%20story%20that%20I%20thought%20would%20interest%20you.%0D%0A%0D%0Ahttps%3A%2F%2Fnews.bloomberglaw.com%2Flitigation%2Fuber-avoids-california-ballot-war-as-governor-signs-lawyers-deal%3Futm_source%3DEmail_Share). # Uber Avoids California Ballot War With Signed Lawyer Deal (1). A legislative agreement brokered by Uber Technologies Inc. and the Consumer Attorneys of California to end an expensive ballot measure battle was signed into law Thursday by Gov. Gavin Newsom. In response to the new law, both parties have pulled their respective initiatives from the ballot, which would have asked California voters in November to decide major policy questions about car accident contingency fees and liability for Uber driver sexual assaults. Each campaign had already spent over $70 million on their respective initiatives before qualifying for the ballot earlier this month. The Uber-backed initiative would have placed a 25% cap ... ## Learn more about Bloomberg Law or Log In to keep reading:. He is starring in SBS's new Friday-Saturday drama "Manager Kim," which premieres on the 26th, and posed for the photo shoot alongside co-stars Choi Tae-hoon and Yoon Kyung-ho. In the photo shoot, So Ji-sub immersed himself in the role of Manager Kim, an accountant at a savings bank and a single dad in "Manager Kim," revealing a mature charm. With his distinctive look featuring a beard, he wore shirts and suits, exuding charisma. recentArticles.title: So Many Celebrities Attend Dior Homme Menswear Spring/Summer 2027's Fashion Show: Photos & Guest List, Revealed! - Just Jared
recentArticles.snippet: So many stars stepped out for the ***Dior Homme Menswear Spring/Summer 2027*** show as part of Paris Fashion Week on Wednesday (June 24) in Paris, France. Some of the celebs were posed for photos at the show include **James Marsden**, 52, with his girlfriend, Dutch model **Frederique Brons**, 28, **Iris Apatow**, 23, and **Sam Nivola**, 22, **Pharrell Williams** and his wife **Helen Lasichanh**, influencer **Jake Shane**, **Mike Faist**, and **Drew Starkey**. We have photos of all the biggest attendees, which also included *I Swear*‘s **Robert Aramayo**, *SAS: Rogue Heroes*‘ **Connor Swindells, LaKeith Stanfield,** *The White Lotus*‘ **Alexander Ludwig**, *I Play Rocky*‘s **Anthony Ippolito,** actress **Sophie Okonedo**, record producer **Chris Ivery**, rapper **Little Simz**, socialite **Fai Khadra**, and more! Posted To:Alexander Ludwig Anthony Ippolito Arón Piper Chiwetel Ejiofor Chris Ivery Connor Swindells Drew Starkey Fai Khadra Fashion Frederique Brons Helen Lasichanh Iris Apatow James Marsden Jimin Lakeith Stanfield Little Simz Mike Faist Paul W Downs Pharrell Williams Robert Aramayo Sam Nivola Sophie Okonedo.

recentArticles.title: Want to see Jacob Collier live? Get tickets with a discount today - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Want to see Jacob Collier live? Starting in late September, the mid-2010s internet star-turned-seven-time Grammy winner is slated to set off on his intimate solo ‘The Light For Days Tour’ in support of his 2025 album with the same name. If you’d like to see the “In My Room” singer live, tickets are available for all his North American gigs. At the time of publication, the lowest price we could find on seats for any one show was $118 including fees on SeatGeek. Tickets start at $548 including fees for Collier’s night at Carnegie Hall. For more information, our team has everything you need to know and more about seeing Jacob Collier’s 2026 ‘The Light For Days Tour’ below. ## How much are tickets to see Jacob Collier on tour in 2026? A complete calendar including all North American tour dates, venues and links to the cheapest tickets available can be found here:. 30 at Carnegie Hall in New York, NY | $548 (including fees) |.

recentArticles.title: 'Jersey Shore' star Jenni 'JWoww' Farley marries pro wrestler Zack Carpinello in surprise wedding - Page Six
recentArticles.snippet: ##### Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift’s strict wedding rule for... Shop Prime Day like a star with deals on A-list beauty favorites: Crest, Charlotte Tilbury and more. # ‘Jersey Shore’ star Jenni ‘JWoww’ Farley marries pro wrestler Zack Carpinello in surprise wedding. Congratulations are in order for Jenni “JWoww” Farley and her new husband Zack Carpinello! The couple surprised their wedding guests with the ceremony, as they invited 50 friends and family members to the venue for what they believed to be a special screening of her upcoming film, “Nanny Cam.”. Farley walked to her now-husband to the tune of Lana Del Rey’s “Young and Beautiful” — the same song her best friend Nicole “Snooki” Polizzi used for her first dance at her wedding to Jionni LaValle in 2014. “From my ruby ring and Zack’s new rose gold wedding band featuring rubies, to our color palette and the gifts we incorporated for our children, the ruby represented love, family, and the next chapter of our story.”.
recentArticles.summary: 這則新聞報導了《Jersey Shore》明星Jenni 'JWoww' Farley與職業摔角手Zack Carpinello的驚喜婚禮，內容與周杰倫無關。
